Event: Titanic Excavation - Jul 2025
Event Date: 16/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI206
Descendant's Memorial Ring

Once in a while the unit shoots an icicle at the nearest enemy unit. The target takes 650000 magic damage on hit and has a 50% chance to have deep freeze applied to them for 4 sec. If deep freeze is applied, the ring owner shoots a second icicle which hits the nearest non-frozen enemy. The icicle deals 650000 magic damage and applied deep freeze for 4 sec. The units frozen by any of the icicles can't move and attack, and the cooldown of their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 4 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 500000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearby enemies. The icicles deal 325000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 55% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
